description: Verified navigation links for Home, Blog, Portfolio, Videos, and Contact in the header at 375x812; the 'Contact' link incorrectly routes to '/contcat' instead of '/contact', resulting in a 404 error.

issues.name: Incorrect navigation path for 'Contact' link
issues.description: Expected: The 'Contact' link in the header should navigate to '/contact'. Actual: The 'Contact' link in the header navigates to '/contcat' instead of '/contact', resulting in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 using a mobile viewport 375x812.
Locate the 'Contact' link in the navigation header.
Observe the URL and page content.
issues.expectedBehavior: The 'Contact' link in the header should navigate to '/contact'.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'Contact' link in the header navigates to '/contcat' instead of '/contact', resulting in a 404 error page.
